Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by ELDoctor Pay.

value.description: The service code used for processing.

display.description: The user-friendly name of the service.

category.description: The category the service belongs to (e.g., 'Mobile/Recharge').

isActive.description: Whether the service is currently active and available to users.

price.description: The sale price of the service, especially for fixed-price items like scratch cards.

commission.description: The commission rate or fixed amount for this service.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents an invoice generated for a service transaction.

date.description: The date the invoice was created.

serviceName.description: The display name of the service at the time of transaction.

serviceCode.description: The service code used for processing.

transactionId.description: The transaction identifier provided by the service.

fees.description: The fees associated with the transaction.

total.description: The total amount (amount + fees) of the transaction.

referenceCode.description: A unique reference code for the transaction.

apiId.description: The local transaction ID sent to the payment API.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the invoice was created.

createdBy.description: The UID of the user who created the invoice.

userName.description: The display name of the user at the time of the transaction.

scratchCardCode.description: The actual scratch card code if this invoice is for a card vending service.

commission.description: The commission earned by the user for this transaction.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Authentication.

displayName.description: The user's display name, typically their full name.

businessName.description: The name of the user's business.

businessAddress.description: The address of the user's business.

role.description: The role of the user, which determines their permissions.

accountStatus.description: The approval status of the user's account.

totalCommission.description: The total commission earned by the user.

isActive.description: Whether the user account is active or disabled by an admin.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the user profile was created.

idFrontUrl.description: URL to the front of the user's ID card image.

idBackUrl.description: URL to the back of the user's ID card image.

storePhotoUrl.description: URL to the user's store/business photo.

ScratchCard.title: Scratch Card
ScratchCard.description: Represents a single scratch card in the inventory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the scratch card document.

serviceValue.description: The service code (e.g., 'crvo') this card is for, linking it to the services collection.

code.description: The actual scratch card recharge code.

isUsed.description: True if the card has been sold, false if it's available in inventory.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the card was added to inventory.

usedAt.description: Timestamp when the card was sold.

usedBy.description: The UID of the user who purchased the card.

invoiceId.description: The ID of the invoice document for this card's sale.

ErrorLog.title: Error Log
ErrorLog.description: Represents a log entry for an error that occurred in the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the error log.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the error occurred.

userId.description: The UID of the user who encountered the error.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

errorDetails.description: Additional details or stack trace of the error.

context.description: The context in which the error occurred (e.g., 'Invoice Creation').

DepositMethod.title: Deposit Method
DepositMethod.description: Represents a method for users to deposit funds (e.g., bank transfer, Vodafone Cash).

instructions.description: Instructions for the user (e.g., 'Include your user ID in the notes').

DepositRequest.title: Deposit Request
DepositRequest.description: A user's request to have their balance updated after a manual deposit.

userId.description: UID of the user making the request.

methodId.description: ID of the deposit method used.

methodName.description: Name of the deposit method used.

transactionRef.description: Transaction reference from the user's payment app.

reviewedBy.description: UID of the admin who reviewed the request.

SystemSettings.title: System Settings
SystemSettings.description: Global settings for the application, managed by the admin.

paymentMode.description: The current payment processing mode for the system.

Complaint.title: Complaint
Complaint.description: Represents a user-submitted complaint or support ticket.

userId.description: UID of the user who submitted the complaint.

title.description: The subject or title of the complaint.

relatedInvoiceId.description: Optional ID of an invoice related to the complaint.

status.description: The current status of the complaint.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the complaint was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the complaint was last updated by an admin.

adminNotes.description: Internal notes for administrators regarding the complaint.

resolution.description: The final resolution provided to the user.

/services/{serviceId}.description: Collection of services offered by ELDoctor Pay. Each document represents a single service.

/invoices/{invoiceId}.description: Collection of invoices generated for service transactions. Each document represents a single invoice.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile information, including their role and balance.

/scratchCards/{cardId}.description: Inventory of scratch card codes. Managed only by admins.

/errorLogs/{logId}.description: Collection of error logs for administrative review.

/depositMethods/{methodId}.description: Admin-managed list of available deposit methods for users.

/systemSettings/payment.description: A single document that holds system-wide settings, like the payment mode.
